description_long: This street food stall features a dark wooden structure with a prominent, steeply sloped black roof and exposed wooden beams. The front of the stall is open, with a wide serving counter made of lighter wood, accompanied by four round stools for customers. Decorative red lanterns hang inside, and a round sign with a bowl of ramen and chopsticks is displayed above the serving window. The interior includes visible kitchenware such as bowls and a pot, and a crate with bottles is placed at the side. The overall design evokes a traditional Japanese ramen stand, blending rustic wood textures with simple, functional elements.
description: A traditional-style wooden street food stall with a black sloped roof, open serving counter, stools, and decorative lanterns.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open serving counter, four stools, kitchenware, and a round ramen sign above the window.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the sloped roof, the side of the counter, and the arrangement of stools.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the closed back wall, a crate with bottles, and partial visibility of the interior kitchenware.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the roof, stools, and partial counter visible, as well as the crate on the side.
attribute_signage: A round sign above the serving window featuring a stylized bowl of ramen with chopsticks, in red and white, with no visible text.
attribute_serving_counter: A wide, rectangular wooden counter at the front, light in color, with space for serving and displaying food, and no glass shield or cash register visible.
attribute_food_display: Food items such as bowls and a pot are openly displayed on the counter, easily visible and accessible, with no protective covering.
